title: Interactive Elements Test: 'GET STARTED' Button Functionality
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to the main screen., Step 2: Tap the 'GET STARTED' button.
expected_result: Step 3: User should navigate to the search page after tapping the 'GET STARTED' button.

title: Social Media Icon Interaction Test: Opening Social Profiles
test_steps: Step 1: Tap the Facebook icon., Step 2: Verify that the Facebook app or facebook.com opens., Step 3: Repeat step 1 for LinkedIn and Google Plus icons., Step 4: Verify that the respective platforms open.
expected_result: Step 5: Upon clicking Facebook, verify that the correct URL loads., Step 6: Upon clicking LinkedIn, verify that the correct URL loads., Step 7: Upon clicking Google Plus, verify that the correct URL loads.

title: Map Interaction Test: Location Pin Click
test_steps: Step 1: Zoom into the map view., Step 2: Tap the red pin marking a specific location., Step 3: Verify that details about the location are displayed.
expected_result: Step 4: The location details should accurately reflect information associated with the red pin., Step 5: There should be no unexpected behavior when interacting with the map pin.

title: Profile Card Display Test: Correct Information Presentation
test_steps: Step 1: Ensure the profile card shows the photo labeled 'Jennifer'., Step 2: Check that the title 'Top Model' is displayed under the photo.
expected_result: Step 3: The profile card should contain accurate personal information matching the provided test data., Step 4: All text elements within the profile card should be readable and properly formatted.

title: Font Size Accessibility Test: Readability
test_steps: Step 1: Verify that the heading font size is approximately 24sp., Step 2: Verify that the body text font size is around 16sp., Step 3: Verify that the caption font size is close to 12sp.
expected_result: Step 4: Text elements should maintain readability across different devices and resolutions., Step 5: Users with visual impairments should be able to comfortably read all text elements.
